metadata.briefing: In a significant market event, the Russia-linked crypto exchange Grinex has halted trading following a $14 million hack, raising concerns about security in the crypto space. Despite Bitcoin breaking above $75,000, market sentiment remains cautious, with bears holding their ground amidst macro uncertainty and profit-taking activities. Looking ahead, investors should stay vigilant as regulatory and security challenges continue to shape the evolving landscape of cryptocurrency and AI technologies.

news.title: Russia-linked crypto exchange Grinex halts trading after $14M hack

summary.main: Grinex has been accused by US authorities of assisting Russia and other entities in evading sanctions and laundering funds for Russia-linked hackers.
